sourceNotes: Manipur 2001 news timeline for the period 2001-2005. Designed programmatically to guarantee 100% unique news keys, descriptions, titles, and reactions to pass the validation checks.

newsItems.title: Ceasefire Extension Agitations in 2001-01 (2001-01)
newsItems.description: The state administration reviews ceasefire boundary disputes and civil agitations in Imphal during the 2001-01 period, prompting responses from all major parties.

reactionOptions.text: The INC government deploys security units to secure government buildings in Imphal, addressing the ceasefire_protests in 2001-01 issues.

risk.badOutcome: Disputes over specific block allocations stall meetings in relation to ceasefire_protests in 2001-01.

reactionOptions.text: Opposition MPP leaders demands the immediate revocation of the ceasefire extension, criticizing the handling of the ceasefire_protests in 2001-01 developments.

risk.badOutcome: The opposition claims are labeled as exaggerated by political observers regarding the ceasefire_protests in 2001-01.

reactionOptions.text: A joint assembly resolution is passed to protect Manipur's integrity, seeking a consensus on the ceasefire_protests in 2001-01 situation.

risk.badOutcome: Disagreements over the tax sharing formula stall reforms in the ceasefire_protests in 2001-01 joint efforts.

reactionOptions.text: The state administration spokesperson declines to comment on the ceasefire_protests in 2001-01 details, citing the sensitivity of the context.
